title: Gireeja Ranade | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: Gireeja Ranade | EECS at UC Berkeley Gireeja Ranade: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo Gireeja Ranade Associate Teaching Professor Contact Information ranade@eecs.berkeley.edu Office Hours Changes each semester, please email, 565 Cory Links Personal Homepage Publications Research Support Sarah Lirio 353 Cory sarah.lirio@berkeley.edu Education 2014, Ph.D., EECS, University of California, Berkeley 2009, M.S., EECS, University of California, Berkeley 2007, B.S., EECS, Massachusetts Institute of Technology Research Areas Information, Data, Network, and Communication Sciences (IDNCS) Artificial Intelligence (AI) Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR) Education (EDUC) Research Centers Center for the Theoretical Foundations of Learning, Inference, Information, Intelligence, Mathematics and Microeconomics at Berkeley (CLIMB) Teaching Schedule CS 194-271.
